summary: Plan-only PR remediation assessment for five open pull requests. No GitHub mutations are planned because comments, labels, closes, force-pushes, and check bypasses are blocked by the job, and no PR has complete merge preflight proof. Two PRs have failing checks but cannot safely be emitted as fix actions because the supplied result contains no complete executable fix_artifact; they are kept as independent non-mutating classifications with repair blockers recorded. Three require human or preflight follow-up because required merge proof is incomplete or the scope is broad.

actions.reason: Merge is blocked by failing proof/checks and missing complete merge preflight. This PR should not be merged from this plan result, and a fix action cannot be emitted without a complete executable fix_artifact.
The PR may be viable, but the supplied artifact lacks required merge preflight proof. Human or preflight follow-up is needed before any merge recommendation.
This is a broader compatibility-affecting feature PR. Even with passing checks, it needs maintainer judgment and complete merge preflight before merge.
The PR looks close, but required merge preflight is incomplete in the artifact. Human or preflight follow-up is needed before any merge recommendation.

Merge is blocked by the failing dependency check and missing complete merge preflight. This PR should not be merged from this plan result, and a fix action cannot be emitted without a complete executable fix_artifact.

needs_human: #89104: missing required merge preflight proof despite passing checks.
#89152: broad compatibility-affecting feature scope plus missing required merge preflight proof.
